/usr/bin/cc    CMakeFiles/supr.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/supr.dir/src/sys_db_worker.c.o CMakeFiles/supr.dir/src/sys_logger.c.o CMakeFiles/supr.dir/src/sys_supr.c.o CMakeFiles/supr.dir/src/sys_upper_listener.c.o CMakeFiles/supr.dir/__/sys_share/sys_ctl.c.o CMakeFiles/supr.dir/__/sys_share/sys_globals.c.o CMakeFiles/supr.dir/__/sys_share/sys_share_daemon.c.o CMakeFiles/supr.dir/__/sys_share/sys_share_ipc.c.o  -o supr  -lpthread
